CustomField.formula: IF(Count_of_Opportunities__c = Won_Opportunities__c && text(Status__c) != "Won", 1, IF(Count_of_Opportunities__c = Lost_Opportunities__c && text(Status__c) != "Lost", 1, IF(Count_of_Opportunities__c = Open_Opportunities__c && text(Status__c) != "Open", 1, IF(Count_of_Opportunities__c = Closed_Client_Abandoned_Proposal_Opps__c && text(Status__c) != "Closed - Client Abandoned Proposal", 1, IF(Count_of_Opportunities__c = Closed_No_Change_Opportunities__c && text(Status__c) != "Closed - No Change", 1, 0)))))
CustomField.label: Validate Deal Status
